ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the financial instrument on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the financial instrument on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the financial instrument on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the financial instrument on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the financial instrument on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, accounting for corporate actions */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument on the given date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, option, future) */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the financial instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the financial instrument belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the financial instrument belongs */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the financial instrument is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cik" TEXT /* Central Index Key (CIK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, trader) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_data" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price movement, economic indicator release) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the alert is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_instruments" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order in which the financial instrument appears on the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id", "instrument_id")
)
